sections.paragraph:
Ῥώμη, ης, ἡ (Aristot., Polyb. et al.; ins, 1 Macc, SibOr, Philo, Joseph., Just.) the capital city of the Roman Empire, Rome without the art. Ac 19:21; 23:11; 28:16; Ro 1:7 (where the words ἐν Ῥ. are missing in many mss.; s. Ltzm., Hdb. exc. on Ro 1:7; Zahn, comm., exc. I p. 615; Harnack, ZNW 3, 1902, 83ff; RSteinmetz, ZNW 9, 1908, 177ff), vs. 15 (here, too, the words ἐν Ῥώμῃ are omitted in a few isolated mss.); 2 Ti 1:17; 1 Cl ins; IEph 1:2; 21:2; IRo 5:1; 10:2; EpilMosq 2; Hv 1, 1, 1. Also 1 Pt 5:13 v.l. and the subscr. of Gal, Eph, Phil, Col, 2 Th, 2 Ti, Phlm, Hb; AcPl Ha 7, 8 and 14.—W. the art. (Just., A I, 56, 2 ἐν τῇ βασιλίδι Ῥώμῃ) Ac 18:2; 28:14, 16 v.l.; AcPl Ha 6, 16; 7, 8 and 32; 9, 19. S. prec. entry.—Pauly-W. IV 1441–51; Kl. Pauly IV 1441ff; BHHW III 1606–9; EDNT.

Aristot Aristot , various works, IV b.c.—List 5

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

ins Ins, ins = Inscription, Inschrift, inscription(s). Without a period, esp. in lists, as at the beginning of entries; the capitalized form is used in titles. In conjunction with literary works this abbr. refers to the title or description of contents.

SibOr SibOr = Oracula Sibyllina, II–III a.d.—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Joseph Joseph This abbr. used when no specific texts are cited (s. Jos.); I a.d.—List 5

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

art. art. = article

Ltzm. Ltzm. = HLietzmann, commentator and editor of various works

Hdb. Hdb. = Handbuch (in connection with a specific NT book, the ref. is to a commentary in the series Handbuch zum Neuen Testament, founded by HLietzmann)—List 6

exc. exc. = except

Zahn Zahn = TZ., various works—List 6

comm. comm. = commentary, -aries, commentator(s)

ZNW ZNW = Zeitschrift für die ntl. Wissenschaft—List 6

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

IEph IEph = Ignatius to the Ephesians—List 1

IRo IRo = Ignatius to the Romans—List 1

EpilMosq EpilMosq = Epilogus Mosquensis—List 1

Hv Hv = Visions

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

subscr. subscr. = subscription

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

prec. prec. = preceding

Pauly-W Pauly-W = AP./GW., Real-Encyclopädie der klassischen Altertumswissenschaft—List 6

Kl. Pauly Kl. Pauly = Der Kleine Pauly: Lexikon der Antike—List 6

BHHW BHHW = Biblisch-historisches Handwörterbuch—List 6

EDNT EDNT = Exegetical Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 908
